title: Code Refactoring with Agentic AI and Reinforcement Learning
summary: This blog post reviews the integration of agentic AI and reinforcement learning for automating code refactoring. It formalizes refactoring as a Markov Decision Process where code states are transformed by refactoring actions, with rewards based on code quality metrics. The article discusses agentic architectures, including single-agent and multi-agent systems like OpenAI's Codex, which use RL to iteratively improve codebases. It highlights how LLMs can be fine-tuned via policy gradients to generate refactorings that preserve correctness while enhancing maintainability. The post concludes that these techniques enable autonomous, continuous code optimization without manual intervention.
author: Aziro
